product: Default warehouse setting is now available in Beta
tagline: Set a default warehouse that will be automatically selected in the compute selector across the SQL editor, AI/BI dashboards, Genie Spaces, Alerts, and Catalog Explorer.
what_it_does: Set a default warehouse that will be automatically selected in the compute selector across the SQL editor, AI/BI dashboards, Genie Spaces, Alerts, and Catalog Explorer. Individual users can override this setting by selecting a different warehouse before running a query. They can also define their own user level default warehouse to apply across their sessions.
why_it_matters: To reduce query latency, increase the size.

capabilities.title: Pro and classic SQL warehouses
capabilities.desc: Pro and classic SQL warehouses: The default is 45 minutes, which is recommended for typical use. The minimum is 10 minutes.

capabilities.desc: Assign Can use to users who need to run queries on the warehouse.

key_takeaway: Set a default warehouse that will be automatically selected in the compute selector across the SQL editor, AI/BI dashboards, Genie Spaces, Alerts, and Catalog Explorer.
